smell_boolean_logic.description: Simplify boolean expressions using any()/all()/named predicates.

smell_return_statements.description: Refactor to a single result path; manual review required.

smell_nested_control_flow.description: Extract helper functions to flatten control flow; manual review required.

smell_function_parameters.description: Decompose function or introduce a domain context object; manual review required.

smell_function_complexity.description: Decompose the function into smaller helpers; manual review required.

smell_file_complexity.description: Split the module into focused units; manual review required.

smell_identical_code.description: Extract a shared helper or canonical constant; manual review required.

smell_similar_code.description: Refactor to a shared abstraction; manual review required.

smell_function_parameters: Decompose into smaller functions or pass a context/model object only when it carries domain meaning; adding a params model solely to silence this rule is abominable.
smell_return_statements: Refactor to a single result path; use early returns only when they improve readability.
smell_nested_control_flow: function {name} has {count} nested control-flow levels > max {max}
Extract helper functions to flatten control flow.
smell_boolean_logic: Simplify boolean expressions or introduce named predicates.
smell_function_complexity: Decompose the function into smaller, single-responsibility helpers.
smell_file_complexity: Split the module into focused units.
smell_identical_code: Extract a shared helper or canonical constant.
smell_similar_code: Refactor to a shared abstraction or delegate to a common helper.

beartype_rows.description: Function parameter count exceeds FLEXT threshold; decompose or use a domain context object.

code_smell_rows.description: Function has too many return statements; prefer a single result path.
Function nesting depth exceeds FLEXT threshold; flatten with helpers.
Boolean-logic complexity exceeds FLEXT threshold; simplify or name predicates.
Function cyclomatic complexity exceeds FLEXT threshold; decompose.
Module cyclomatic complexity exceeds FLEXT threshold; split the module.
Identical code blocks detected across the workspace; extract shared helpers.
Similar code blocks detected across the workspace; refactor to shared abstractions.
